sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32204" key="e)kkodomeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκκοδομεύω</orth>, <sense id="n32204.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bake in an oven,</tr_> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
